timeRange.title: Select Time Range
timeRange.subtitle: Choose the time period to extract commits from

projectSummary.title: Commit Summary
projectSummary.subtitle: Review extracted commits by project. Exclude any you don't want to send to AI.

aiContext.title: Edit AI Context
aiContext.subtitle: Review what will be sent to AI and add extra context
aiContext.privacyHint: This is everything that will be sent to AI. Local paths stay private and excluded commits are omitted.
aiContext.extraContextHint: Add non-code work: meetings, docs, code reviews, etc. This will be sent to AI along with commits.
aiContext.extraContextPlaceholder:
For example:
• Joined an architecture review and agreed on the service split
• Wrote the API design guide
• Next week: add error handling and monitoring
aiContext.apiKeyHint: Kept in memory for this session only and cleared when the app closes.

localAgents.title: Local Agents
localAgents.readyDescription: Installed and signed-in local agents are ready to use with their existing session—no need to sign in again.
localAgents.actionDescription: Local agents were found, but they need to be signed in or updated first.
localAgents.notFound: No connectable local agents were found. Install Codex or Claude Code, or set the corresponding BIN environment variable, then scan again.
localAgents.desktopRequired: Local agent detection is available in the DevWeek desktop app only.
localAgents.credentialsHint: DevWeek only reuses the agent's existing sign-in state; it never reads, copies, or stores sign-in credentials.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Configure Git identity, language, and the AI service
settings.userIdentityHint: Used to filter Git commits. Multiple emails supported.

errors.desktopRequired: Adding local repositories requires the DevWeek desktop app
errors.noProjects: Add and select at least one Git repository first
errors.dateRangeIncomplete: Select both a start and end date
errors.dateRangeOrder: The start date cannot be later than the end date
errors.noEvidence: Keep at least one commit as evidence
errors.apiKeyRequired: Enter an API key first; it is kept in memory for this session only
errors.invalidAiReport: The model did not return a valid structured report
errors.unverifiedAiReport: The AI report did not contain any verifiable Git evidence
errors.codexNotFound: Local Codex CLI was not found. Check the installation and refresh.
errors.codexAuthRequired: Codex is not signed in. Run codex login in a terminal first.
errors.codexIncompatible: This Codex version is too old. Update it and try again.
errors.codexBusy: Another Codex generation is already running.
errors.codexTimeout: Codex generation timed out. Try again.
errors.codexExecutionFailed: Codex could not finish the report. Check local Codex and try again.
errors.codexInvalidResponse: Codex did not return a valid structured report.
errors.codexStartFailed: The local Codex process could not be started.
errors.claudeNotFound: Local Claude Code was not found. Check the installation and scan again.
errors.claudeAuthRequired: Claude Code is not signed in. Run claude auth login in a terminal first.
errors.claudeIncompatible: This Claude Code version lacks the required safe-connection capabilities. Update it and try again.
errors.claudeBusy: Another Claude Code generation is already running.
errors.claudeTimeout: Claude Code generation timed out. Try again.
errors.claudeExecutionFailed: Claude Code could not finish the report. Check its local status and try again.
errors.claudeAuthFailed: Claude Code credentials were rejected by the service. Sign in again in a terminal and retry.
errors.claudeModelUnavailable: The configured Claude Code model has no available channel. Choose another model or try again later.
errors.claudeGatewayIncompatible: The custom Claude upstream rejected this request mode. Check its Claude Code compatibility.
errors.claudeServiceUnavailable: The Claude service is temporarily unavailable. Try again later.
errors.claudeRateLimited: Claude is receiving too many requests. Try again later.
errors.claudeInvalidResponse: Claude Code did not return a valid structured report.
errors.claudeStartFailed: The local Claude Code process could not be started.
